- Engine(s):
- Platform / OS:
- Hardware:

## Checklist

- [ ] Separation logic still lives only in `sukoon-core` (no shell reimplements it).
- [ ] No ad-blocking / skipping / muting was added.
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` and `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` pass.
- [ ] `pnpm lint` and tests pass.
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or API changed.
- [ ] `LICENSING.md` re-checked if a model/FFmpeg dependency changed.
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits.
